problem: Why does the immune system attack the body's own tissue in autoimmune disease?
hypothesis: The key to Why does the immune system attack the body's own tissue in autoimmune disease? is Mitochondrial membrane potential modulation — specifically Mitochondrial membrane potential — which would help 50,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Human organoid model with 11 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
